strain_or_system: E. coli under glucose and xylose conditions
available_data_type: metabolic network models; flux maps; supplementary data
relation_to_our_FBA_conditions: Directly relevant to glucose aerobic and glucose anaerobic FBA conditions
main_use_in_project: External comparison for oxygen availability and carbon source effects
limitations: Includes xylose, which was not part of the current FBA medium comparison
source_title: Comprehensive analysis of glucose and xylose metabolism in Escherichia coli under aerobic and anaerobic conditions by 13C metabolic flux analysis

strain_or_system: E. coli transcriptional regulator mutants and reference conditions
available_data_type: absolute metabolic fluxes; supplementary flux tables
relation_to_our_FBA_conditions: Directly relevant to glucose aerobic and galactose aerobic FBA conditions
main_use_in_project: External comparison for glucose versus galactose flux behavior
limitations: Includes many transcriptional regulator mutants, so not all data points are direct wild-type comparisons
source_title: Large-scale 13C-flux analysis reveals distinct transcriptional control of respiratory and fermentative metabolism in Escherichia coli

oxygen_conditions: not used as a direct medium-condition comparator
available_data_type: raw GC-MS data; supporting data; metabolic network model; flux analysis results
relation_to_our_FBA_conditions: Relevant as an example of experimental 13C-MFA workflow and intracellular flux estimation
main_use_in_project: Methodological reference for experimental fluxomics datasets
limitations: Mutant case study; not directly comparable to wild-type FBA growth predictions

strain_or_system: engineered E. coli for acetol production
oxygen_conditions: not used as a direct oxygen-condition comparator
available_data_type: metabolic fluxes; supplementary material; metabolomics-related data
relation_to_our_FBA_conditions: Relevant to the glycerol aerobic FBA condition
main_use_in_project: External comparison for glycerol-based metabolic flux behavior
limitations: Engineered production strain; not a direct wild-type E. coli comparator
source_title: 13C metabolic flux analysis-guided metabolic engineering of Escherichia coli for improved acetol production from glycerol
